name: Steve Perry
bio: Steve Perry has a durable rock / pop catalog that continues to attract listeners through streaming, playlists, and replay value.
notable_for: Steve Perry remains closely associated with Oh Sherrie and Foolish Heart, which still anchor attention around the catalog.
career_highlight: Songs like Oh Sherrie and Foolish Heart still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Repeat streaming and playlist familiarity help the biggest songs keep earning after release.
Broad recognition supports social reuse, rediscovery, and steady catalog listening.
Licensing and event-driven playback can create recurring spikes.
